director_notes: FINAL CONFIG 2026-04-15: System is in diagnostic/pre-operational state. The session classifier bug (all orders tagged 'unknown' and rejected) is the single highest-priority fix — no strategy change will improve fill rate until this is resolved. Session gate remains enforced; the fix is to capture session at signal generation time and assert non-unknown before routing, not to disable the gate. Three conflicting position-size parameters have been unified: max_single_name_pct=0.04 is the operative single-name ceiling; max_position_pct_equity=0.07 governs tier slot sizing; the redundant max_single_position_pct fields in both config blocks are deprecated. Margin authorization is removed from director notes — no margin is approved until compliance is formally confirmed. Catalyst tag is now a hard entry gate: any entry without a named, non-null catalyst is blocked. Sector rotation bias is temporarily set to commodities_overweight (energy, gold) reflecting geopolitical context; this expires 2026-04-22 and must be reviewed. No signal weight changes are authorized this cycle — n=2 closed trades provides zero statistical basis for recalibration. Recalibration gate set at n=30 confirmed fills. Vector memory must be restored before any confidence-based signal calibration is meaningful.

account2.cycle_offset_note: Account 2 runs 90s after Account 1 each market cycle to consume fresh signal scores

signal_weights.recalibration_trigger: n >= 30 closed trades with confirmed fills and non-unknown session tags
